name: Bank of India – Financial Literacy Counsellor – 1 Posts

basic_details.job_title: Bank of India Financial Literacy Counsellor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Bank of India Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Financial Literacy Counsellor. Candidates with Graduate / Post graduate degree Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 25-05-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through Bank of India official website bankofindia.bank.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate / Post graduate degree from UGC recognized University, Proficiency in local language (reading, writing, speaking and understanding), Retired Bank Officer in Scale I and above preferred, Background of rural credit and branch exposure preferred, Integrity not doubtful during service

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Bank of India Financial Literacy Counsellor Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: Bank of India Financial Literacy Counsellor Recruitment 2026
